title.a: ​​​​​​​CISA and Women in CyberSecurity Strengthen Partnership to Bridge Gender Gap in Cyber and Tech

item.description: Today, in recognition of International Women’s Day, CISA is pleased to announce the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Women in CyberSecurity (WiCyS) in order to work even closer together to bridge the gender gap in cybersecurity.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: Readout: Director Easterly Visits Carnegie Mellon University, Calls for “Radical Change” for Technology Product Safety in Major Address

item.description: CISA released its 2022 Year in Review, highlighting the extensive work of CISA and its partners over the past year to protect the nation’s critical infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: CISA Releases Report for K-12 Schools to Help Address Evolving Cybersecurity Threats

item.description: Report and Corresponding Toolkit Provides Simple and Prioritized Recommendations for the K-12 Community.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: Readout of Second Joint Ransomware Task Force Meeting

item.description: The Joint Ransomware Task Force (JRTF) reviewed efforts and actions aimed at reducing the prevalence and impact of ransomware incidents. JRTF members discussed activities undertaken by Working Groups.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: DHS Announces New Cybersecurity Performance Goals for Critical Infrastructure

item.description: CISA developed cross-sector recommendations to help organizations prioritize cybersecurity investments.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: Readout from CISA's Fifth Cybersecurity Advisory Committee Meeting

item.description: At the 5th Cybersecurity Advisory Committee (CSAC), Director Easterly led a discussion with committee members on the CSAC’s strategic focus for 2023.
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: CISA Reminds Online Shoppers to Stay Vigilant to Cyber Threats This Holiday Season

item.description: By checking your devices, shopping from trusted sources, and using safe purchasing methods, shoppers can stay safe online
item.dc:creator: CISA

title.a: CISA Updates the Infrastructure Resilience Planning Framework

item.description: The Infrastructure Resilience Planning Framework helps SLTT partners to incorporate critical infrastructure resilience considerations into planning activities.
item.dc:creator: CISA
